user.title: Connect to LLM
user.description:
Enter the URL of your OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint.

Ollama default: http://localhost:11434

AutoMagic will auto-detect the best available model for the first AI service. You can add more services later from Settings.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to LLM endpoint. Check the URL and ensure the server is running.
error.no_models: Connected but no models found. Install a model first (e.g. ollama pull qwen2.5:7b).

abort.cannot_delete_last_service: At least one AI service must stay configured.
abort.service_not_found: That AI service is no longer available.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to LLM endpoint. Check the URL and ensure the server is running.
error.no_models: Connected but no models found. Install a model first or enter the model name manually.

init.title: Manage AI Services
init.description: Add, edit, delete, or choose the default AI service used by the AutoMagic panel.

add_service.title: Add AI Service
add_service.description: Add another endpoint/model combination that can be chosen from the AutoMagic panel.

edit_pick.title: Choose AI Service
edit_pick.description: Pick which AI service to edit.

edit_service.title: Edit AI Service
edit_service.description: Update the endpoint, model, or timeout for the selected AI service.

delete_service.title: Delete AI Service
delete_service.description: Remove one AI service from AutoMagic.

default_service.title: Default AI Service
default_service.description: Choose which AI service is preselected on the AutoMagic panel.
